title: Squid Fritters Italian Style
description: A crispy and flavorful Italian squid fritter recipe, perfect for a light lunch or dinner. This dish combines the crunch of a fritter with the delicate taste of squid.

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, combine squid, flaky, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together buttery crumble, ethiopian, and water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix well.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the oil.
Fry the fritters until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
